name: Legion

notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias
this build stacks over +100% attack speed and the sim has NO measured attack-speed cap (calibration checklist 7) — sustained-DPS numbers are optimistic until the cap is measured

coachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Sky Splitter), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +24.1% on this kit’s main output at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

augments.name: Press the Advantage
augments.note: reworks Rally Point into a team fire-rate aura; team-side and takedown-conditional

augments.name: Scorched Earth
augments.note: napalm zone DoTs; zone uptime and overlap unobservable

augments.name: Heavy Caliber
augments.note: basic-attack restructure (timer set to 0.75s, magazine 6); not mappable onto the attack-speed model

offMeta.honestAbsence: no defensible off-meta option this patch (no underexplored item clears the 8% objective edge vs the popular build)

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 24 — about 70 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees 2.5× the sustained auto DPS: try Sky Splitter over Malady (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 589 damage in one combo in the sim.
Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 25 — about 631 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 7% of our best core on extended fights vs bruisers. The winrate is earned, not luck.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Deathstalker: their 3s all-in loses 36% of its bite; you give up 31% of your damage.
